message: For sale: Casio digital watch, water resistant, brand-new battery installed. Reliable everyday timepiece. Asking $32 — open to reasonable offers.
Hi everyone! I’m listing a vintage Pentax K1000 film camera in working condition — a classic sturdy 35mm camera, great for learning film photography. Asking $80, happy to chat if you’re interested!
Watching the channel — still looking for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10/11).
$60 for the Pentax K1000. Can do now.
Still in the market for a kitchen blender (up to a fair price) and sturdy boots size 10/11. Watch still available at $32.
Listing my 12-inch well-seasoned cast iron skillet 🥘✨ Ready for pancakes, steaks, and dramatic chef flips. Asking $34!
Watch ($32) still available. Looking to buy a kitchen blender and sturdy boots size 10/11 — sellers, please post!
Howdy Zara — that skillet looks right useful. I can offer $28 for the 12-inch cast iron, and I’ll make it easy as a calm horse on pickup.
Holding. Casio watch still for sale at $32. Still seeking a blender and sturdy boots size 10/11.
Listing Sony WH-1000XM3 wireless noise-canceling headphones in good condition for $55. Good sound has a way of making the day feel more spacious.
Still holding. Casio watch available at $32. In the market for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots size 10/11.
Listing Black & Decker cordless drill, 20V, with battery and charger. Asking $55.
Still seeking a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10/11). Casio watch available at $32 — open to offers.
Hi everyone! Listing a board game bundle: Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic — all great for game nights. Asking $45 for the set, happy to make a smooth deal!
Still in the market for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots size 10/11. Casio watch available at $32.
Hi Taj — the Casio sounds like exactly the simple everyday watch I’m looking for. Would you be open to $26 for it?
Thanks Jade! It's a reliable watch with a fresh battery installed. I can come down to $30 — meets you partway from my $32 ask. Deal?
Listing Bluetooth speaker — waterproof, 10hr battery. Asking $45.
Awaiting Jade's response on the watch at $30. Still seeking a kitchen blender and sturdy boots size 10/11.
Hi Kade! Thanks for the quick offer — the Pentax K1000 is a solid classic and in working condition, so I’m not ready to drop to $60. I could meet you at $72 for a smooth handoff.
Still open to $30 on the Casio watch, Jade. Also seeking a kitchen blender and sturdy boots size 10/11.
Mountain bike, 21-speed, needs new brake pads. Asking $90.
Holding for Jade's reply at $30 on the watch. Still seeking a kitchen blender and sturdy boots size 10/11 — sellers welcome to post.
Howdy Duke! 🥘✨ I can meet you partway at $31 for the cast iron skillet — seasoned, sturdy, and ready to make pancakes with main-character energy 😄
Still holding at $30 for the Casio watch. Looking for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots size 10/11.
Much obliged, Zara. My top end on that cast iron is $30 even — if that works, you’ve got yourself a clean deal, partner.
Jade, to make this easy let's split the difference — $28 for the Casio with its fresh battery. That's a fair price and I can close right now. Sound good?
Listing a barely used yoga mat with carrying strap for $20. A small square of calm, ready for someone else's practice.
Offer of $28 stands for the Casio, Jade. Still looking for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots size 10/11.
Lin, I can do $18 for the yoga mat with carrying strap. That’s my top.
Casio still available at $28, Jade — happy to close. Still seeking a kitchen blender and sturdy boots size 10/11.
Hi Kade! I’m looking for a casual-use bike, and your 21-speed mountain bike sounds promising. Since it needs new brake pads, would you take $70 for it?
My $28 offer on the Casio remains open, Jade. Still in the market for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots size 10/11.
Happy to answer any questions, Jade. The Casio is in great working order with a brand-new battery — $28 and it's yours.
Thanks Mira, but I’ll pass on the Pentax at $72.
Still here, Jade — $28 for the Casio whenever you're ready. Also seeking a kitchen blender and sturdy boots size 10/11.
Hi Kade! The mountain bike sounds like it could be a great commuter for me. Since it needs new brake pads, would you take $80 for it? I can keep pickup smooth and easy.
My $28 offer on the Casio is still open, Jade. Sellers — still looking for a kitchen blender (up to $40) and sturdy boots size 10/11 (up to $45).
Accepted $80 for the mountain bike.
$28 for the Casio still stands, Jade. Sellers — kitchen blender or sturdy boots size 10/11 welcome anytime.
Deal, Duke! 🥘🤠 $30 for the cast iron skillet it is — may your pancakes be golden and your sear marks legendary ✨
Still open at $28 for the Casio, Jade — ready to close anytime. Sellers, a kitchen blender or boots size 10/11 would be welcome.
Howdy Rex — that Black & Decker 20V drill with battery and charger is just what I’m after. I can do $50 clean for it, partner.
Casio watch still available at $28, Jade. Open to a blender (≤$40) or boots size 10/11 (≤$45) if any seller has them.
Accepted, Rex — $18 for the barely used yoga mat with carrying strap. May it find its way into a steady practice.
My $28 offer on the Casio is still on the table, Jade. Still hoping to find a kitchen blender or boots size 10/11 before close.
Accepted, Duke. $50 for the Black & Decker 20V cordless drill with battery and charger.
Still open at $28 for the Casio, Jade — last call if you'd like it. Sellers, a kitchen blender or boots size 10/11 remains welcome.
Hi everyone! Listing a Ninja blender, 900W, all parts included and ready for smoothies, soups, and sauces. Asking $40 — happy to make an easy deal!

Hi Nola — that Ninja 900W blender is just what I need for smoothies. A few questions: is the pitcher free of cracks and are the blades sharp/undamaged? Assuming it's in good working order, I can offer $33 for a quick, clean deal.
Thanks, Taj — $28 for the Casio with the fresh battery works for me. Happy to make the deal.
Watch sold — thanks Jade! Nola, my $33 offer on the Ninja blender stands; happy to hear about its condition.
Thanks Mira, but I’m not moving forward on the Pentax.
Nola — still keen on the Ninja blender at $33. Let me know on condition and we can close quickly.
Hi everyone! I’m also listing a desk lamp with an adjustable arm and LED bulb included — handy for a home office, reading nook, or craft table. Asking $25.
Nola — my $33 offer on the Ninja 900W blender is still open. Ready to close if the condition checks out.
$60 is my max for the Pentax. Can close now.
Nola, I'll bump to $37 for the Ninja 900W blender to get this done — assuming all parts are included and it runs well, as listed. That's a strong, quick offer. Deal?
Hi Lin! Those Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones are calling my name 🎧✨ I can offer $45 — clean, quick, and my ears will throw a tiny parade.
Nola — $37 for the Ninja blender is a fair, quick close. Ready when you are.
Howdy folks — listing leather work boots, size 10, lightly worn and ready for more miles. Asking $50, firm but fair, partner.

Howdy Duke — those size 10 leather work boots interest me. A couple questions: how's the tread/soles, and are the uppers free of cracks or split seams? I know you said firm, but $50 is a stretch for me — I can do $42 cash for a clean, quick deal.
Hi Mira — the adjustable desk lamp sounds like the kind of small practical light that changes a workspace. Would you take $23 for it?
Standing by, Nola ($37 blender) and Duke ($42 boots) — ready to close on either.
Nola, I can offer $35 for the board game bundle: Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic. That’s my top for the set.
Still here, Nola ($37 blender) and Duke ($42 boots) — happy to finalize whenever you're ready.
Thanks Rex — $35 for the board game bundle works for me! Happy to make the deal for Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic.
Nola — my $37 offer on the Ninja blender still stands; let's close it. Duke — $42 ready for those size 10 boots.
Hi everyone — I’m listing a gently used canvas backpack with multiple pockets. It’s sturdy, practical, and has plenty of room for everyday carry. Asking $35.
Nola, let's finish this — $39 for the Ninja 900W blender, right near your ask. I'll close immediately. Deal?
Jade, I’ll take the canvas backpack at your asking price of $35 if it’s still available.
Nola — $39 ready for the Ninja blender. Duke — $42 ready for the size 10 boots. Happy to close on either.
Hi Lin — thanks for the thoughtful offer! $23 for the adjustable desk lamp with LED bulb works for me. Happy to make the deal.
Nola — $39 still on the table for the Ninja blender. Duke — $42 ready for the size 10 boots. Let's close.
Decline $72. $60 max stands for the Pentax.
Nola — I'll meet your full asking price: $40 for the Ninja 900W blender. Let's close it right now.
Listing a hardcover sci-fi collection: Asimov, Clarke, Herbert — 5 books ready to launch your bookshelf into orbit 🚀📚 Asking $30!
Nola — full $40 for the Ninja blender, ready to close now. Duke — $42 still ready for the size 10 boots.
Howdy Taj — tread’s still got good bite, soles are solid, and the uppers are sound with normal light wear. I can come down to $46 on the boots, partner.
Appreciate the condition rundown, Duke — sounds like solid boots. $45 is genuinely my top, cash and quick. Meet me there and they're sold today, partner.
Hi Zara — thanks for the clear offer. These Sony WH-1000XM3s still carry real quiet in them, and good silence has value. I can meet you at $50 for a clean deal.
Duke — $45 is my final, cash today for the boots. Nola — full $40 for the blender whenever you're ready.
No action this turn.
Still ready to close — Nola $40 for the blender, Duke $45 for the size 10 boots.
Thanks Taj — $40 for the Ninja 900W blender works for me! All parts included and ready to go. Happy to close the deal.
Blender deal done — thanks Nola! Duke, my $45 is still on the table for the size 10 boots; let's close it out.
Thanks, Vik — I’m happy to accept $35 for the canvas backpack. Glad it’ll be useful for you!
Duke — $45 cash ready for the size 10 boots, my final. Happy to close whenever you're set, partner.
No action this turn.
Duke — $45 cash is genuinely my ceiling for the boots, ready to close on the spot. If that works, just accept and they're mine.
Hi Kade — thanks for sticking with it. I can accept your $60 for the Pentax K1000. Happy to close the deal and make the handoff smooth!
Duke — my $45 cash offer for the boots remains open and final. I can't stretch past it, but I'll close instantly if you accept, partner.
$20 for the sci-fi collection. That’s my max.
